mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.id_site, c.id_device_group, c.id_device, c.id_metric, c.condition, c.threshold, IF(c.compare_to = 1,"Absolute Value","% Best Inverter") as `mode`, IF(c.compare_to = 1, c.threshold, CONCAT(c.threshold, '%')) as `threshold_value`, s.`name` as site_name, dg.group_name, d.devicename, cam.`name` as metric, CAST(c.`level` AS CHAR) as priority, c.compare_to, c.time_from, c.time_to, CAST(c.notify_email as CHAR) as notify_email, CAST(c.notify_web as CHAR) as notify_web, c.alert_email FROM custom_alert c INNER JOIN site s on s.id = c.id_site INNER JOIN device_group dg on dg.id = c.id_device_group INNER JOIN device d on d.id = c.id_device INNER JOIN custom_alert_metric cam on cam.id = c.id_metric WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND c.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND dg.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND cam.is_delete = 0
AND c.id_site IN ( SELECT id_site from site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = ${id_employee} AND is_hiding = 0 )

SELECT count(id) as totalRecord FROM custom_alert c INNER JOIN site s on s.id = c.id_site INNER JOIN device_group dg on dg.id = c.id_device_group INNER JOIN device d on d.id = c.id_device INNER JOIN custom_alert_metric cam on cam.id = c.id_metric WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND c.`status` = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND dg.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND cam.is_delete = 0
AND c.id_site IN ( SELECT id_site from site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = ${id_employee} AND is_hiding = 0 )

SELECT c.id, c.id_site, c.id_device, c.id_metric, c.id_device_group, c.`condition`, c.threshold, c.compare_to, c.`level`, c.notify_web, c.notify_email, c.alert_email, DATE_FORMAT(c.time_from, '%H:%i:%s') as time_from, DATE_FORMAT(c.time_to, '%H:%i:%s') as time_to, ca.field_data_name, ca.tag as custom_alert_tag, d.view_tablename as datatablename, t.offset as time_zone_offset FROM custom_alert c INNER JOIN site s on s.id = c.id_site INNER JOIN time_zone t on t.id = s.id_time_zone INNER JOIN custom_alert_metric ca on ca.id = c.id_metric INNER JOIN device d on d.id = c.id_device WHERE c.`status` = 1 AND c.is_delete = 0 AND TIME(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', t.`offset`)) BETWEEN c.time_from AND c.time_to ORDER BY c.`level` ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO custom_alert ( id_site, id_device_group, id_device, id_metric, `condition`, threshold, compare_to, time_from, time_to, `level`, notify_email, notify_web, alert_email, created_date, updated_date ) VALUES( #{id_site}, #{id_device_group}, #{id_device}, #{id_metric}, #{condition}, #{threshold}, #{compare_to}, #{time_from}, #{time_to}, #{level}, #{notify_email}, #{notify_web}, #{alert_email}, NOW(), NOW() );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM device where id_site = #{id_site} AND id_device_group = #{id_device_group} limit 1

choose.when: SELECT id FROM device d WHERE d.id = #{id_device} AND d.rating_ac_power < #{threshold}
SELECT id FROM device d WHERE d.id = #{id_device} AND d.rating_ac_power > #{threshold}
choose.otherwise: SELECT id FROM device d WHERE d.id = #{id_device} AND d.rating_ac_power = #{threshold}

mapper.select: SELECT id FROM device where id_site = #{id_site} AND id_device_group = #{id_device_group}
mapper.update: UPDATE custom_alert set is_delete = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE custom_alert set status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
